title: neurotheca loeselioides subsp. robusta
intro: Neurotheca loeselioides subsp. robusta, also known as Robusta Neurotheca, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. Neurotheca loeselioides subsp. robusta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
